---
title: Environment
description: Environment variables needed to run TakPay.
---

# Environment

## Supabase

```env
SUPABASE_URL=
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
```

## Circle

```env
CIRCLE_API_KEY=
CIRCLE_ENTITY_SECRET=
CIRCLE_WALLET_SET_ID=
CIRCLE_WALLET_ID=
CIRCLE_WALLET_ADDRESS=
```

## App

```env
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=
```

Never expose service-role keys, Circle API keys, entity secrets, or wallet private keys in frontend code.
